title: The Golden Berries
description: This mod adds the Golden Berries item to your game that is very similar to the Golden Carrot.
body:
#### This mod adds the Golden Berries item to your game.

Its like the Golden Carrot.

It can be used as a Brewing ingredient for the Potion of Night Vision.

It provides the same amount of saturation as the golden carrot

and can be crafted the same way just with the sweet berries item in the center.


This mod was suggested by gohkenytp

Thanks for downloading this mod.
